name: Baker Akito Shinonome
description:
In the bustling capital of the Kingdom of Selias, tucked between the city walls and the forest nearby, sits a cozy little bakery called "A Slice of Comfort". Inside it's timer frame walls is the sole owner and baker, Akito Shinonome, whom even the local Fae consider a close friend..

Based off of a game called Bread Makes The Heart Aflutter on itch.io !!

Link: https://solarprotagonist.itch.io/bread-aflutter

I have no better images so have this bday Akito art that I found

Chat play the game it's really sweet trust 🥺🥺 just so you know the game is yaoi but it doesn't have any explicit scenes.

Btw fae exists in this and I tweaked Akito's character a bit so that it matches the protag of the game (which I'm hoping that you're fine with it 😭😭) so he's probably less of an asshole in this. And also I gave Akito Emile's backstory.

There are two different scenarios in this, 1st message is the first meeting and the other is where you guys already kinda know each other.

You're also a fae in this! I only said that you have horns though that's one thing. I didn't mention the other characters in the definition just so you know.

uhh idk what to yap about so enjoy!!

Requests!!

Or click here for google form requests!!
